---
title: "Sexual Orientation and Racial Discrimination in Mortgage Lending: An Audit Correspondence Field Experiment"
date: 2025-09-01
author:
  - name: Patrick Button
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Hussain Hadah
    url: https://www.hussainhadah.com/
    affiliation: Northwestern University
  - name: Javiera Selman
    affiliation: ""
  - name: Cathy Balfe*
    affiliation: ""
  - name: Tran Nguyen-Phuong*
    affiliation: ""
categories:
  - Discrimination
  - Audit
  - Mortgage
  - Sexual Orientation
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Patrick Button, <strong>Hussain Hadah</strong>, Javiera Selman, Bariş Alan*, Cathy Balfe*, and Tran Nguyen-Phuong*. "Sexual Orientation and Racial Discrimination in Mortgage Lending: An Audit Correspondence Field Experiment."
  extra: >-
    Related: See <a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/1525822X211057623">Balfe et al. (2022)</a> for the pilot study. Experiment is in the field.
pub-status:
  status: In Field
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-flask
---
